title: Witch Hunt
description:
A modpack about deceiving other!
Play as a Human, Werewolf, Vampire or even a Hunter!
body:
## Witch Hunt Deceive others and find who's not what they pretend to be on the "Witch Hunt" Modpack, you will experience lot's of emotions during your adventure. Made for Minecraft 1.19.2 using Forge, play on the server given by the Modpack for an optimal gameplay. You can play as a Human, Werewolf, Vampire or even a Hunter. As a Vampire or Werewolf you will have to hide among the humans to not get targeted by Hunters. Explore the skill tree your origin gives you (only for Hunters, Werewolves and Vampires). Learn magic and create your own spells!! There's much more coming soon. Minecraft server and it's packed with thrilling add-ons. If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to reach out on our [Discord Channel](https://discord.gg/WCKbKQC5V4). (it's not on the server of the modpack maker but on the server of the server host which is also the one who shared the modpack)
Support


Made by [DemonsHeart](https://ko-fi.com/heartbreaker69)
